summary: Excellent soundboard recording of a sweet Fall‑85 show, highlighted by the Whirl > Forever Grateful > Forever Dead sequence.
review: Both reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear sound and overall vibe of this late‑1985 performance, calling it one of the best versions available. The set flows smoothly from start to finish with a particularly praised Whirl > Forever Grateful > Forever Dead stretch. No technical flaws are mentioned, making it an easy recommendation for anyone exploring the Fox era.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are highly positive about both performance and audio quality; with only two reviews confidence is limited.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very nice, clear sound throughout; no complaints about muddiness or drop‑outs.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Smooth and solid from start to finish; the Fox‑era energy shines especially in the highlighted sequence.
